reason: Frontend layer entry — verify all changes follow the layered structure.
Verify workspaceMode derivation is single-source; activeProjectId correctly cleared on floating-repo select; no duplicate sources of truth introduced.
Verify useWorkspaceMode is pure-derived (no Tauri side effects), memoized, and exposes a clear return shape.
Verify WorkspaceMode union is exhaustively narrowed at all consumers; no any/unchecked casts, no implicit nullish hiding of zero-repo cases.
Verify LeftSidebar floating-repo additions and 'add floating repo' entry do not directly call invoke; all I/O routed through services.
Verify §3 employee-UI hide-rule still holds for floating repos in single_repo mode; no regression in shouldHideEmployeeUi.
If list_floating_repositories was added, verify naming/serde/error-code conformance.
Confirm no new migration was added (M0 must be schema-neutral).
Verify single-direction layering: AppImpl/hooks -> services -> IPC, never reversed.
Verify promotion reuses createProject + addRepositoryToProject; no duplicated session anchor logic; no parallel implementation of existing utils.
